name: gerifinancial
description: Financial management application with bank scraping capabilities

scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start-services: powershell -Command "Start-Service MongoDB -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service Memurai -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'MongoDB and Redis services started'"
scripts.dev: npm run start-services && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.test: concurrently "cd backend && npm test" "cd frontend && npm test"
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
